ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" TEXT /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Team's Twitter handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's official website */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* League's Twitter handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "career_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the manager started their career */,
  "career_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the manager ended their career */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the manager */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the manager */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the manager */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Manager's Twitter handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year of the season */,
  "league_id" TEXT /* ID of the league the season belongs to */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  "champion_team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  "runner_up_team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team that was the runner-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_seasons" (
  "team_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-season record */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Final ranking of the team in the season */,
  "playoff_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of playoff appearances */,
  "playoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of playoff wins */,
  "playoff_losses" INTEGER /* Number of playoff losses */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won */,
  "division_id" TEXT /* ID of the division the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES seasons ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manager_tenures" (
  "tenure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager tenure */,
  "manager_id" TEXT /* ID of the manager */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Year of the tenure */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tenure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tenure */,
  "inseason_change" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the manager change occurred during the season */,
  "division_id" TEXT /* ID of the division the team was in during the tenure */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the change in manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manager_tenures_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manager_tenures_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES seasons ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was born */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand of the player */,
  "throwing_hand" TEXT /* Throwing hand of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Player's Twitter handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_managers" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-manager relationship */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "manager_id" TEXT /* ID of the manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the relationship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the relationship */,
  "division_id" TEXT /* ID of the division the player was in during the tenure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_managers_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_schedules" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "home_team_id" TEXT /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" TEXT /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "division_id" TEXT /* ID of the division the game is part of */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedules_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedules_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedules_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES seasons ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game result */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "winner_team_id" TEXT /* ID of the winning team */,
  "loser_team_id" TEXT /* ID of the losing team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_winner_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_schedules ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_loser_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("loser_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game stat record */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "rbis" INTEGER /* Number of RBIs */,
  "bases_on_balls" INTEGER /* Number of bases on balls */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "doubles" INTEGER /* Number of doubles */,
  "triples" INTEGER /* Number of triples */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases */,
  "caught_stealing" INTEGER /* Number of times caught stealing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_schedules ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manager_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager game stat record */,
  "manager_id" TEXT /* ID of the manager */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "decisions_made" INTEGER /* Number of decisions made */,
  "successful_decisions" INTEGER /* Number of successful decisions */,
  "total_decisions" INTEGER /* Total number of decisions */,
  "balks" INTEGER /* Number of balks called */,
  "wild_pitches" INTEGER /* Number of wild pitches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manager_game_stats_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manager_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_schedules ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team game stat record */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "total_hits" INTEGER /* Total number of hits */,
  "total_runs" INTEGER /* Total number of runs scored */,
  "total_rbis" INTEGER /* Total number of RBIs */,
  "total_bases_on_balls" INTEGER /* Total number of bases on balls */,
  "total_strikeouts" INTEGER /* Total number of strikeouts */,
  "doubles" INTEGER /* Total number of doubles */,
  "triples" INTEGER /* Total number of triples */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Total number of home runs */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Total number of stolen bases */,
  "caught_stealing" INTEGER /* Total number of times caught stealing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_schedules ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_game_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "recipient_id" TEXT /* ID of the recipient (player or manager) */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., Player, Manager) */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" TEXT /* ID of the user's role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
